title: Death Engine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Nickname}}
"'''Death Engine'''" was the name [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] applied to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military vehicle which took part in the second wave of an [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (Galactic Civil War)|attack on]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa's]] [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].

The Death Engine was massive and black, with at least ten blast weapons mounted all over its surface. It had two pincer-like projections in front, making it look like a monstrous crab floating on its [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]]. The Death Engine was controlled from a well-protected command cockpit in its center.

As [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] was in overall command of the attack on Nar Shaddaa, and had initially intended to follow the first wave of the Imperial assault, he may have had personal command of the Death Engine. Whoever was in command had no regard for civilian casualties: the Death Engine's attack collapsed an entire quarter of the Corellian Sector, destroying approximately twenty levels.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars comic books|webstrip]] version of "[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]," the "Death Engine" is not pictured. However, the two Imperial attack ships which took part in the beginning of the battle, identified as disguised [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|"Gamma Assault Shuttles"]] in the text, have two projections in the front which could be described as "crab-like". The "Death Engine" Greedo sees may simply be another modified ''Gamma''-class assault shuttle.
